name: Baton Custodian
description: Monitoring agent for circuit health and self-healing. Polls adapter health endpoints, detects faults, and runs repair actions. All repairs are atomic: new thing running before old removed.

types.name: LifecycleActions
types.description: Protocol for lifecycle actions the custodian can invoke.

types.name: RepairPlaybook
types.description: Determines repair action based on fault type and history.

types.name: Custodian

fields.name: _adapters
fields.description: Dictionary of adapter instances keyed by node name

fields.name: _state
fields.description: Current circuit state containing adapter states

fields.name: _lifecycle
fields.description: Optional lifecycle actions manager for repair operations

fields.name: _poll_interval
fields.description: Interval between health check cycles in seconds

fields.name: _running
fields.description: Flag indicating if monitoring loop is active

types.description: Long-running monitoring loop. Manages adapter health checks, failure detection, and automated repair actions.

functions.name: LifecycleActions.restart_service
functions.description: Restart a service node by name. Protocol method that must be implemented by lifecycle manager.

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Name of the node/service to restart

preconditions: node_name is a valid service identifier
postconditions: Service with node_name has been restarted

functions.name: LifecycleActions.slot_mock
functions.description: Replace a service node with a mock implementation. Protocol method that must be implemented by lifecycle manager.

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Name of the node/service to replace with mock

preconditions: node_name is a valid service identifier
postconditions: Service with node_name has been replaced with mock

functions.name: RepairPlaybook.decide
functions.description: Decide what repair action to take based on adapter state. Returns ESCALATE if service is already mock. Returns RESTART_SERVICE if consecutive_failures < FAILURE_THRESHOLD * 2. Otherwise returns REPLACE_SERVICE.

inputs.name: adapter_state
inputs.description: Current state of the adapter including failure count and service info

preconditions: adapter_state has valid service attribute with is_mock property
postconditions: Returns appropriate CustodianAction based on state

functions.name: Custodian.__init__
functions.description: Initialize Custodian with adapters, circuit state, and optional lifecycle manager and playbook. Sets up monitoring configuration.

inputs.name: adapters
inputs.description: Dictionary mapping node names to adapter instances

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: Circuit state object containing adapter states

inputs.name: lifecycle
inputs.description: Optional lifecycle actions manager for repairs

inputs.name: poll_interval
inputs.description: Health check polling interval in seconds (defaults to HEALTH_POLL_INTERVAL)

postconditions: Custodian instance is initialized with all required state
_running is False
_events is empty list
_playbook is set to provided or new RepairPlaybook()

functions.name: Custodian.events
functions.description: Property that returns a copy of all custodian events (repairs, escalations) logged so far.
postconditions: Returns a new list containing all events

functions.name: Custodian.is_running
functions.description: Property that returns whether the monitoring loop is currently running.
postconditions: Returns current value of _running flag

functions.name: Custodian.run
functions.description: Main monitoring loop. Sets _running to True, logs startup, continuously checks all adapters at poll_interval, and logs shutdown when stopped.
postconditions: _running is set to True on entry
_running is False when loop exits

structured_side_effects.description: Sets running flag to True, then False on exit

functions.name: Custodian.stop
functions.description: Signal the monitoring loop to stop by setting _running to False.
postconditions: _running is False

functions.name: Custodian.check_once
functions.description: Run one check cycle and return any events generated during this cycle.
postconditions: Returns list of events created during this check cycle
_check_all has been executed once

structured_side_effects.description: Updates adapter health state and may append events

functions.name: Custodian._check_all
functions.description: Check health of all adapters. Updates last_health_check and last_health_verdict. Increments consecutive_failures on UNHEALTHY, triggers repair at FAILURE_THRESHOLD. Resets consecutive_failures on HEALTHY and restores FAULTED status to ACTIVE.
postconditions: All adapter states updated with latest health check results
Consecutive failure counters updated
Repair triggered if failures >= FAILURE_THRESHOLD

structured_side_effects.description: Updates health check timestamps, verdicts, failure counts, and status

functions.name: Custodian._repair
functions.description: Execute repair action for a faulted node. Creates CustodianEvent, decides action via playbook, executes lifecycle action if available. Sets adapter status to FAULTED on failure. Resets consecutive_failures to 0 on successful repair. Logs repair outcome.

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Name of the node to repair

inputs.name: adapter_state
inputs.description: State of the adapter being repaired

error_cases.name: lifecycle_action_failure
error_cases.condition: Exception raised during lifecycle.restart_service or lifecycle.slot_mock

postconditions: CustodianEvent created and appended to _events
If lifecycle is None: adapter_state.status set to FAULTED
If repair succeeds: consecutive_failures reset to 0
If repair fails: adapter_state.status set to FAULTED

structured_side_effects.description: Updates failure count, status, and appends event
May restart or replace service via lifecycle manager

invariants: Repairs are atomic: new thing running before old removed
Consecutive failures counter resets to 0 on successful repair or healthy check
